# styled-components

> CSS-in-JS for React. Tagged template literals to style components. Scoped styles, dynamic styling via props, automatic critical CSS. v6 is TypeScript-native, uses stylis v4, supports React Server Components (v6.3+). Current prerelease: v6.4.0-prerelease.8.

## Setup

```
npm install styled-components
```

Next.js: `compiler: { styledComponents: true }` in next.config.js (SWC plugin, built-in).

Vite: `react({ babel: { plugins: ['babel-plugin-styled-components'] } })` in vite config.

## API

```tsx
import styled, { css, keyframes, createGlobalStyle, createTheme, ThemeProvider, ThemeConsumer, ThemeContext, useTheme, withTheme, StyleSheetManager, ServerStyleSheet, isStyledComponent } from 'styled-components';
```

`styled.tagname` or `styled(Component)` -- returns a styled React component.

`.attrs(props => ({}))` -- attach/override props; provided props become optional on the component type (v6.4+). Use for static HTML attrs and inline `style` for per-frame updates.

`css` helper -- required when interpolating `keyframes` in shared fragments.

`createGlobalStyle` -- injects global CSS. No `@import` (fails silently in prod via CSSOM). Use `<link>` in `<head>` instead.

`createTheme(obj, { prefix?, selector? })` -- CSS variable theming across RSC and client (v6.4+). Returns theme object where leaf values are `var(--prefix-path, fallback)` references. Pass to `ThemeProvider` for stable class hashing across themes. `theme.raw` has the original values. `theme.resolve(el?)` reads computed DOM values (client-only). Object keys become var names as-is (camelCase preserved): `{ color: { codeBg: 'x' } }` with prefix `'sc'` produces `var(--sc-color-codeBg, x)`. Framework-managed vars (e.g. next/font `--font-sans`) should stay outside the theme.

CSS-first dark mode with createTheme: define light theme as default, mount `theme.GlobalStyle` inside ThemeProvider for `:root` vars, then override specific `--prefix-*` vars under `html.dark` / `@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark)` in a separate global style. The CSS class overrides beat `:root` specificity, preventing flash. Define dark overrides as a delta object (only changed keys), then derive both the full dark theme and the CSS override string from it:

```tsx
const darkColors: Partial<typeof lightTheme.color> = { bg: '...', text: '...' };
const darkTheme = { ...lightTheme, color: { ...lightTheme.color, ...darkColors } };
const darkCSS = Object.entries(darkColors).map(([k, v]) => `--sc-color-${k}:${v};`).join('');
```

`ThemeProvider` -- context-based theming. No-op in RSC (v6.3+); use `createTheme` or CSS custom properties instead. Also: `ThemeConsumer`, `ThemeContext`, `useTheme`, `withTheme` (HOC).

`StyleSheetManager` props: `enableVendorPrefixes`, `shouldForwardProp`, `stylisPlugins` (v4-compat), `target` (Shadow DOM v6.1.13+), `disableCSSOMInjection`, `nonce` (CSP, v6.4+). No-op in RSC.

`ServerStyleSheet` -- SSR support. Constructor accepts `{ nonce }` for CSP (v6.4+).

`isStyledComponent(comp)` -- check if a component was created by styled-components.

Exported types (v6.0.8+): `CSSProperties`, `CSSObject`, `CSSPseudos`, `CSSKeyframes`, `DefaultTheme`.

## Patterns

Transient props -- `$`-prefix for styling-only props not intended to reach the DOM:

```tsx
const Button = styled.button<{ $primary?: boolean }>`
  background: ${p => p.$primary ? '#BF4F74' : 'white'};
`;
```

Extending: `styled(Base)` inherits styles. Polymorphic: `<Comp as="a">` or `styled(Comp).attrs({ as: 'a' })`.

Component selectors: `` &:hover ${Icon} { fill: red; } `` targets another styled component. Only works between styled components -- `${PlainComponent}` throws.

Style objects: `styled.div({ display: 'flex' })` or `styled.div<Props>(p => ({ bg: p.$bg }))`.

Keyframes:

```tsx
const spin = keyframes`from { transform: rotate(0deg); } to { transform: rotate(360deg); }`;
const Spinner = styled.div`animation: ${spin} 1s linear infinite;`;
```

Theme typing:

```tsx
// styled.d.ts
import 'styled-components';
declare module 'styled-components' {
  export interface DefaultTheme { colors: { primary: string } }
}
```

When wrapping custom components, `className` must be optional in props interface.

## Gotchas

Specificity override: repeat `&` to bump specificity without `!important`:

```tsx
const Override = styled(LibraryComponent)`
  &&& { color: #BF4F74; font-weight: bold; }
`;
// Compiles to .class.class.class { ... }
```

Override inline styles: `&[style] { prop: value !important; }`.

Two classes per element: a static class (`.sc-*`, same for all instances, used for component selectors) and a dynamic class (changes per unique interpolation result). Know this for testing/selectors.

Duplicate module warning ("several instances of styled-components"): caused by multiple copies in node_modules (monorepos, npm link, multiple entry points). Fix: dedupe, webpack `resolve.alias`, or hoist to monorepo root.

Library authors: put `styled-components` in `peerDependencies` + `devDependencies`, never `dependencies`. Mark as external in your bundler.

SSR font flicker: `@font-face` in `createGlobalStyle` can flicker during rehydration. Fix: `font-display: fallback` in the `@font-face` rule.

## Performance Rules

1. Define styled components at module scope. Inside render = new identity every render = remounts.
2. CSS custom properties > prop interpolations for frequently-changing values. Each unique interpolation = new CSS class. Warns at 200+.
3. `.attrs` + `style` for per-frame updates (mouse, scroll). Zero class generation.
4. Data attributes for discrete variants (finite set). Fully static, one cached class:
   ```tsx
   const Button = styled.button`
     &[data-variant='primary'] { background: #BF4F74; }
   `;
   ```
5. No function interpolations = static component. Class generated once, cached forever.
6. SSR: dynamic interpolations produce per-item CSS rules. Use inline `style` for per-item uniqueness.

## SSR

RSC (v6.3+): zero-config. Inline `<style>` tags, React 19 hoists/deduplicates. No `'use client'` needed. Use static styles + CSS vars for theming + data-attrs for variants.

Traditional: `ServerStyleSheet` + `collectStyles` + `getStyleTags()` + `seal()` in try/finally.

Streaming (v6.2+): `renderToPipeableStream` with `sheet.collectStyles`, `seal()` in `onAllReady`.

Next.js App Router v6.3+: works out of the box. v6.0-6.2: needs `'use client'` registry in layout.

SWC/Babel plugin provides deterministic class IDs for server/client consistency. Optional in RSC v6.3+.

## Security

Unsanitized user input in interpolations = CSS injection. `background: url(${userInput})` can trigger requests. Sanitize with `CSS.escape(input)`.

## Migration: v5 to v6

```sh
npm install styled-components@^6 stylis@^4 && npm uninstall @types/styled-components
```

Breaking changes:
1. Types ship with package. Remove `@types/styled-components`.
2. `shouldForwardProp` off by default. Use transient `$`-props or restore via `StyleSheetManager` + `@emotion/is-prop-valid`.
3. Vendor prefixes off. `<StyleSheetManager enableVendorPrefixes>` to restore.
4. Stylis v4 -- `:hover {}` is now `& :hover {}` (descendant), not `&:hover {}`. Always use `&:hover`, `&::before`, etc.
5. `$as`/`$forwardedAs` dropped. Use `as`/`forwardedAs`.
6. `withComponent()` removed. Use `as` prop.
7. Babel macro removed (v6.1). Standard import + plugin.
8. Node 16+ minimum.

v6.x timeline: v6.0 TypeScript rewrite + transient props | v6.1 macro removed, Shadow DOM target | v6.2 streaming SSR | v6.3 RSC support, HTML/SVG element helpers, CSS var TS support, StrictMode-safe createGlobalStyle | v6.4 createTheme (CSS var theming for RSC+client), attrs callback receives immutable snapshot, CSP nonce auto-detection, performance (3.3x cascading re-renders)

## Upcoming: v6.4.0

Prerelease: `styled-components@test` (v6.4.0-prerelease.8).

CSP nonce auto-detection order: `StyleSheetManager` nonce prop > `ServerStyleSheet({ nonce })` > `<meta property="csp-nonce">` > `<meta name="sc-nonce">` > `__webpack_nonce__`.

Performance (vs 6.3.12): parent re-render cascading to children 3.3x faster, first mount 1.7-2.5x faster, prop changes cycling values 2.3x faster, heavy dynamic layouts (10K children) 1.9x faster.

Behavioral changes:
- `createGlobalStyle` rearchitected -- CSS injection order determined at definition time, not render order. Shared stylesheet groups; unmounting one instance no longer removes styles needed by others.
- `.attrs()` callback receives immutable snapshot (was mutable).
- `as`/`forwardedAs` exposed in `React.ComponentProps`.
- RSC: `:where()` zero-specificity wrapping, `React.cache` style deduplication across instances.
- Dropped IE11. ES2015 target. Removed @emotion/unitless dep.

React Native:
- Replaced postcss with lightweight CSS parser (4-6x faster, removes postcss/nanoid/source-map-js from production).
- `toStyleSheet()` shares style cache with `InlineStyle`.
- Parent re-renders with unchanged children 2.6-3.2x faster.
- Updated component aliases: removed DatePickerIOS, DrawerLayoutAndroid, ProgressBarAndroid, ProgressViewIOS, Slider; added InputAccessoryView, StatusBar, TouchableNativeFeedback, TouchableWithoutFeedback.
